tasks.title: PtySimulator creates PTY master/slave pair
tasks.description: Add fields: master: Option<Box<dyn MasterPty>>, child: Option<Box<dyn Child>>, writer, reader. Implement new(command: &[&str]) -> Result<Self> creating PtyPair and spawning child.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify PtySimulator::new creates a valid PTY pair
AddUnitTest: verify child process is spawned and running
AddUnitTest: verify writer and reader are properly initialized
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error when command is invalid
tasks.impl_notes: Use portable-pty crate for PtyPair creation. Store boxed trait objects for MasterPty and Child to allow dynamic dispatch.

tasks.title: PtySimulator writes strings to PTY slave
tasks.description: Implement write_input(&mut self, input: &str) -> Result<()> to write strings to PTY slave.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify write_input writes string to PTY slave
AddUnitTest: verify data is readable from PTY master after write
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for write failures
tasks.impl_notes: Use the writer field to write to the PTY slave. Ensure proper error handling for IO errors.

tasks.title: PtySimulator reads output from PTY master with timeout
tasks.description: Change signature to read_output(&mut self, timeout: Duration) -> Result<String>. Implement timeout-based reading from PTY master.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify read_output returns data written to PTY slave
AddUnitTest: verify timeout returns empty string when no data
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify timeout handling works correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Use select! or similar mechanism to implement timeout. Return Result<String> with actual output.

tasks.title: PtySimulator resizes PTY window (cols/rows)
tasks.description: Implement resize(&mut self, cols: u16, rows: u16) -> Result<()> to resize PTY window.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify resize changes PTY dimensions
AddUnitTest: verify resize with valid dimensions succeeds
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for invalid dimensions
tasks.impl_notes: Use MasterPty::resize on the master side to set cols and rows.

tasks.title: PtySimulator injects KeyEvent via crossterm
tasks.description: Implement inject_key_event(&mut self, event: KeyEvent) -> Result<()>. Use crossterm::execute! for event injection.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify KeyEvent injection writes to PTY
AddUnitTest: verify injected key events are readable
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for injection failures
tasks.impl_notes: Use crossterm::execute! to write KeyEvent to the PTY writer. Import KeyEvent from crossterm::event.

tasks.title: PtySimulator injects MouseEvent via crossterm
tasks.description: Implement inject_mouse_event(&mut self, event: MouseEvent) -> Result<()>. Use crossterm::execute! for event injection.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify MouseEvent injection writes to PTY
AddUnitTest: verify injected mouse events are readable
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for injection failures
tasks.impl_notes: Use crossterm::execute! to write MouseEvent to the PTY writer. Import MouseEvent from crossterm::event.

tasks.title: BufferDiff compares two Buffers cell-by-cell
tasks.description: Implement diff(&self, expected: &str, actual: &str) -> DiffResult. Parse strings to Buffer and compare cell-by-cell.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify identical buffers return passed=true
AddUnitTest: verify different buffers return passed=false with differences
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify handling of invalid buffer strings
tasks.impl_notes: Parse strings into ratatui Buffer structure. Compare each Cell's symbol, fg, bg, and modifier.

tasks.title: BufferDiff reports exact x,y of differences
tasks.description: Define CellDiff { x: u16, y: u16, expected: Cell, actual: Cell }. Populate differences vector with exact coordinates.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CellDiff contains correct x,y coordinates
AddUnitTest: verify CellDiff captures expected and actual Cell
AddUnitTest: verify all differences are captured in order
tasks.impl_notes: Iterate through buffer area and record position and cell details for each difference.

tasks.title: BufferDiff supports ignoring foreground color
tasks.description: Add ignore_fg: bool field to BufferDiff. Implement ignore_fg(mut self, ignore: bool) -> Self builder method.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ignore_fg=true ignores foreground differences
AddUnitTest: verify ignore_fg=false detects foreground differences
AddUnitTest: verify builder method returns self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Add builder pattern method. When comparing cells, skip foreground color comparison if ignore_fg is true.

tasks.title: BufferDiff supports ignoring background color
tasks.description: Add ignore_bg: bool field to BufferDiff. Implement ignore_bg(mut self, ignore: bool) -> Self builder method.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ignore_bg=true ignores background differences
AddUnitTest: verify ignore_bg=false detects background differences
AddUnitTest: verify builder method returns self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Add builder pattern method. When comparing cells, skip background color comparison if ignore_bg is true.

tasks.title: BufferDiff supports ignoring attributes
tasks.description: Add ignore_attributes: bool field to BufferDiff. Implement ignore_attributes(mut self, ignore: bool) -> Self builder method.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ignore_attributes=true ignores modifier differences
AddUnitTest: verify ignore_attributes=false detects modifier differences
AddUnitTest: verify builder method returns self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Add builder pattern method. When comparing cells, skip modifier comparison if ignore_attributes is true.

tasks.title: BufferDiff provides human-readable diff output
tasks.description: Define DiffResult { passed: bool, expected: Buffer, actual: Buffer, differences: Vec<CellDiff> }. Implement Display trait for DiffResult.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult::Display shows passed status
AddUnitTest: verify diff output includes expected vs actual at each position
AddUnitTest: verify output format is human-readable with coordinates
tasks.impl_notes: Implement fmt method on Display trait. Format should show line-by-line diff with symbols and highlight differences.

tasks.title: StateTester captures serializable state to JSON
tasks.description: Add snapshot: Option<Value> and captured: Vec<Value> fields. Implement capture<S>(&mut self, state: &S) -> Result<()> where S: Serialize.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify capture serializes struct to JSON
AddUnitTest: verify captured state is stored in captured Vec
AddUnitTest: verify capture updates snapshot field
tasks.impl_notes: Use serde_json::to_value for serialization. Store in both snapshot and captured vector.

tasks.title: StateTester compares current state to captured snapshot
tasks.description: Implement assert_state<S>(&self, state: &S) -> Result<()> comparing current state to snapshot.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify assert_state passes when state matches snapshot
AddUnitTest: verify assert_state fails when state differs from snapshot
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error when no snapshot exists
tasks.impl_notes: Serialize current state and compare with snapshot using JSON equality.

tasks.title: StateTester reports mismatches with JSON diff
tasks.description: Implement assert_state_matches(&self, expected: &Value) -> Result<()> to compare against arbitrary Value.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify assert_state_matches passes when values equal
AddUnitTest: verify assert_state_matches fails with diff output
AddUnitTest: verify diff output shows exact field differences
tasks.impl_notes: Compare expected with snapshot. Provide detailed diff output on mismatch.

tasks.title: TestDsl renders widget to Buffer
tasks.description: Implement render(&self, widget: &impl Widget) -> Result<Buffer> to render ratatui widget to Buffer.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify render produces a valid Buffer
AddUnitTest: verify render output matches expected buffer content
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for render failures
tasks.impl_notes: Use ratatui's Frame and Buffer to render widgets. Return the buffer after rendering.

tasks.title: TestDsl composes PTY, BufferDiff, StateTester
tasks.description: Add fields: pty: Option<PtySimulator>, buffer_diff: BufferDiff, state_tester: StateTester. Implement with_pty(mut self, cmd: &[&str]) -> Result<Self> and pty_mut(&mut self) -> Option<&mut PtySimulator>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new() creates empty components
AddUnitTest: verify with_pty creates PtySimulator
AddUnitTest: verify pty_mut returns mutable reference
AddIntegrationTest: verify PTY and BufferDiff can be used together
tasks.impl_notes: Store all three components. with_pty should create and store PtySimulator. pty_mut provides mutable access.

tasks.title: TestDsl provides fluent API with wait-for predicate
tasks.description: Implement assert_buffer_eq, send_keys, wait_for, capture_state, assert_state with fluent API returning &mut Self.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify assert_buffer_eq compares buffers correctly
AddUnitTest: verify send_keys chains and returns mutable self
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for respects timeout and predicate
AddUnitTest: verify capture_state and assert_state work together
AddIntegrationTest: verify fluent API chaining works end-to-end
tasks.impl_notes: All methods should return &mut Self for chaining. wait_for should use Duration and predicate closure.

tasks.title: CliTester spawns process, captures stdout/stderr, returns exit code
tasks.description: Define CliOutput { pub exit_code: i32, pub stdout: String, pub stderr: String }. Implement run(&self, args: &[&str]) -> Result<CliOutput> using std::process::Command.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify run executes command and returns exit code
AddUnitTest: verify stdout is captured correctly
AddUnitTest: verify stderr is captured correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for failed commands
tasks.impl_notes: Use std::process::Command for spawning. Use .output() to capture stdout/stderr.

tasks.title: CliTester cleans up temp directories
tasks.description: Add temp_dir: Option<tempfile::TempDir> field. Implement with_temp_dir(mut self) -> Result<Self> for temp directory management.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify with_temp_dir creates temporary directory
AddUnitTest: verify temp_dir is dropped and cleaned up after use
AddIntegrationTest: verify CliTester works with temp directory
tasks.impl_notes: Store tempfile::TempDir. TempDir automatically cleans up when dropped.

tasks.title: Create tests/pty_tests.rs - PTY functionality tests
tasks.description: Create integration tests for PTY functionality: Test PTY creation with command, write_input and read_output, resize, inject_key_event, inject_mouse_event.

AddIntegrationTest: verify write_input and read_output round-trip
AddIntegrationTest: verify resize changes PTY window size
AddIntegrationTest: verify inject_key_event sends key to PTY
AddIntegrationTest: verify inject_mouse_event sends mouse to PTY
tasks.impl_notes: Create comprehensive test file covering all PTY operations.

tasks.description: Create integration tests for BufferDiff: Test cell-by-cell comparison, ignore_fg option, ignore_bg option, ignore_attributes option, diff output formatting.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify cell-by-cell comparison detects all differences
AddIntegrationTest: verify ignore_fg option works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify ignore_bg option works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify ignore_attributes option works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify diff output formatting is human-readable
tasks.impl_notes: Create comprehensive test file covering all BufferDiff features.

tasks.title: Create tests/state_tests.rs - State testing tests
tasks.description: Create integration tests for StateTester: Test capture serializable state, assert_state with matching state, assert_state with mismatched state (should fail), assert_state_matches.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify capture serializes various state types
AddIntegrationTest: verify assert_state passes with matching state
AddIntegrationTest: verify assert_state fails with mismatched state
AddIntegrationTest: verify assert_state_matches compares values correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Create comprehensive test file covering all StateTester features.

tasks.description: Create integration tests for TestDsl fluent API: Test new() creates empty components, with_pty() creates PTY, pty_mut() returns mutable reference, render() with simple widget, send_keys() chains correctly, wait_for() with predicate, capture_state() and assert_state().
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify new() creates empty TestDsl
AddIntegrationTest: verify with_pty() creates PTY simulator
AddIntegrationTest: verify pty_mut() returns mutable reference
AddIntegrationTest: verify render() renders widget to buffer
AddIntegrationTest: verify send_keys() chains correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify wait_for() respects timeout and predicate
AddIntegrationTest: verify capture_state() and assert_state() work together

tasks.title: Create tests/cli_tests.rs - CLI testing tests
tasks.description: Create integration tests for CliTester: Test run() with simple command, stdout capture, stderr capture, exit code reporting, with_temp_dir() cleanup.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify run() executes simple command
AddIntegrationTest: verify stdout is captured correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify stderr is captured correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify exit code is reported correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify with_temp_dir() creates and cleans up temp dir
tasks.impl_notes: Create comprehensive test file covering all CliTester features.

tasks.description: Create end-to-end integration tests: End-to-end TUI test scenario, PTY + BufferDiff composition, State capture across multiple operations.

RunTestSuite: execute all tests to ensure no regressions
